meaning: n.野鼠类,全胜,大满贯,孤注一掷,什么都干过
examples: The prairie vole is one such animal.
His cousin, the montane vole, is kind of a hit-and-run guy.
Their study was conducted in the prairie vole, a small rodent that mates for life.
And the club hopes the new savage slogan will highlight the plight of the shy vole.
James Silvey, from the Trossachs Water Vole Project, said the voles now had an "established population" in the forest.
